title: Senior Teacher - Career Launcher Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Career Launcher Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Career Launcher Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Career Launcher Holdings Services:
Career Launcher Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher Holdings Services!
